# Spandhika Orthotics

> Spandhika makes SAARTHI, a smart orthotic insole that listens to how you walk and helps you move better — improving posture, comfort, and everyday movement.

Spandhika is an Indian orthotics brand building smart, sensor-equipped insoles. The SAARTHI insole maps foot pressure, detects gait issues, and helps users address common foot pain, posture problems, and movement imbalances.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Spandhika, the SAARTHI smart insole, features, common foot problems it helps with, and waitlist signup.
- [Custom vs Off-the-Shelf Orthotics](/blog/custom-vs-off-the-shelf-orthotics): Comparison guide on insole types, plantar fasciitis support, and smart orthotic benefits.

## Optional

- [Features](/#features): How the SAARTHI smart insole works.
- [Problems we help with](/#problems): Foot, posture, and movement issues SAARTHI addresses.
- [Waitlist](/#waitlist): Join the 2026 launch waitlist.
